education.details: coursework in Informatics Engineering; seminars: SAP, California Payroll Law, Tax Planning (KPMG)

skills_and_achievements: GAAP/IFRS, audit standards, financial reporting & close, budgeting/capitalization, bank reconciliations, AR/AP, payroll (ADP), QuickBooks (advanced), Excel (pivots, macros), SAP (basic), Lacerte (basic). Built new Excel recording system; restructured Profit software to improve budget reports; streamlined procedures/automation; executed AR reporting enhancements; led multi-company monthly/quarterly/annual reconciliations.
